title: Orcades
text:
Orcades can refer to:

Geography
Orcades (islands), the ancient name of the Orkney Islands
Orcades (Roman province), an apocryphal Roman province over Orkney

Transportation
SS Orcades (1921), a ship formerly named Prinz Ludwig (1906)
SS Orcades (1936), a ship torpedoed and sunk during the Second World War
SS Orcades (1947), a cruise ship in service until 1972
